title: Caregiver - Enforce PwD Selection When PwDs Exist but None Selected (16 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-411: System enforces PwD selection before caregiver can express interest in a product. Validates Express Interest blocked without PwD (AC1), enabled after PwD selection, caregiver details shown in interest form not PwD details (AC2). Edge cases: deselecting PwD re-blocks interest, page refresh, multiple PwD switching, mobile viewport.

testCases.title: Caregiver can navigate to product detail page from catalog
steps: Verify URL contains /product/ or page has product content.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Caregiver navigates to a product detail page.

testCases.title: Product detail page has product heading
steps: Verify H1 heading is visible with non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Product detail page displays a product heading.

testCases.title: Express Interest / Contact Vendor button exists on product detail page
steps: Scroll to bottom of product detail page.
Verify Express Interest / Contact Vendor element exists.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Express Interest / Contact Vendor element is present.

testCases.title: PwD selection dropdown available on product detail page
steps: Scroll to express interest / contact vendor area.
Verify PwD selection element is present.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page with PwDs linked.

testCases.title: Express Interest blocked when no PwD is selected
steps: Attempt to click Express Interest / Contact Vendor.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page, no PwD selected.
expectedResults: Express Interest is blocked when no PwD is selected.

testCases.title: No success/confirmation after blocked attempt
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver attempted Express Interest without PwD.
expectedResults: No success message; caregiver remains on product page.

testCases.title: Validation message displayed when expressing interest without PwD
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver attempted Express Interest without PwD.
expectedResults: Validation message indicates PwD selection is required.

testCases.title: Express Interest button enabled after PwD selection
steps: Verify Express Interest / Contact Vendor button is enabled.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page with PwDs available.
expectedResults: Express Interest button enabled after PwD selection.

testCases.title: Deselecting PwD after selection re-blocks Express Interest
steps: Select a PwD — verify Express Interest enabled.
Verify Express Interest is blocked again.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver selected a PwD on product detail page.

testCases.title: No success after deselection and blocked attempt
steps: Verify no success message and page remains on /product/.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver deselected PwD after initial selection.
expectedResults: Express Interest remains blocked after PwD deselection.

testCases.title: Page refresh retains Express Interest blocked state
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page, no PwD selected.
expectedResults: Page refresh does not bypass PwD enforcement.

testCases.title: Page refresh after PwD selection handles state gracefully
steps: Verify page is in a consistent state.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver selected a PwD on product detail page.
expectedResults: Page refresh handles PwD selection state gracefully.

testCases.title: Switching PwD keeps Express Interest enabled
steps: Select PwD #1 — verify Express Interest enabled.
expectedResults: Switching PwD keeps Express Interest enabled.

testCases.title: Mobile viewport renders PwD enforcement correctly
steps: Verify PwD selection and Express Interest elements visible.
expectedResults: PwD enforcement renders correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Multiple products have consistent PwD enforcement
steps: Click first View details, verify enforcement.
Click second View details, verify same enforcement.

testCases.title: Back navigation retains PwD selection state
steps: Verify page is in a consistent state.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver selected a PwD on product detail page.
expectedResults: Back navigation handles PwD selection state gracefully.
